item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 3min Every tee shot from Ludvig Åberg's birdie holes today.
The sweet-swinging Swede leads after Round 1 @RBC_Heritage . 4 3 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 10min "It is hard to trust the body right now."
Despite a recent back injury, @Collin_Morikawa co
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 10min "It is hard to trust the body right now."
Despite a recent back injury, @Collin_Morikawa continues to push through @RBC_Heritage mentally and physically.
He is currently T15. 26 9 mil
